story.iWant: foundational shared components (BottomNav, StreakCounter, LoadingSpinner, ErrorBoundary)
story.soThat: all features can reuse consistent UI patterns and error handling

tasks.task: Create BottomNav component with 4 tabs (Home, Training, Progress, Profile)
Create LoadingSpinner component with 3 size variants
Create ErrorBoundary component with fallback UI
Update existing StreakCounter to use AppContext
Write tests for all components achieving 100% coverage

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: BottomNav: Four tabs (Home, Training, Progress, Profile) with icons and labels
BottomNav: Active state highlighting using coral primary color (#E87461)
BottomNav: Keyboard accessible (Tab navigation, Enter to select)
BottomNav: ARIA roles (navigation, button, aria-current="page" for active)
StreakCounter: Displays current streak from AppContext
LoadingSpinner: Circular spinner using Tailwind animate-spin
LoadingSpinner: Accessible with role="status", aria-live="polite", screen reader text
ErrorBoundary: React error boundary catching component crashes
ErrorBoundary: Fallback UI with friendly message and "Retry" button
ErrorBoundary: Logs error to telemetry service (stub for now)
All components use Tailwind classes (no inline styles)

doc.title: Architecture Specification
doc.section: Project Structure, Implementation Patterns, Cross-Cutting Concerns
doc.snippet: Shared components in src/shared/components/. WCAG 2.1 AA mandatory. 100% test coverage required. Co-located test files.

doc.title: Epic 1 Technical Specification
doc.section: Services and Modules, Component Props Interfaces, Test Strategy
doc.snippet: BottomNav, StreakCounter, LoadingSpinner, ErrorBoundary specs with TypeScript interfaces. AAA pattern mandatory.

file.reason: Existing component created in Story 1.6 - needs integration with AppContext
9 existing tests demonstrating RTL patterns - reference for new component tests
StreakCounter needs to read streak from useApp().state.streak
Context provider included in test wrapper
Context provider included in test wrapper
Custom render wrapper - use for all component tests
shadcn/ui Button - reference for Tailwind patterns

constraints.constraint: 100% test coverage required (statements, branches, functions, lines)
All components must use Tailwind CSS classes - no inline styles
WCAG 2.1 AA compliance mandatory - proper ARIA labels
Co-located tests - ComponentName.test.tsx next to ComponentName.tsx
AAA pattern mandatory (Arrange, Act, Assert) for all tests
Use custom render from tests/test-utils.tsx for all component tests
ErrorBoundary must use React 18+ componentDidCatch pattern
LoadingSpinner must respect prefers-reduced-motion (Tailwind handles this)

interface.name: useApp
interface.signature: useApp(): { state: AppState; dispatch: Dispatch<AppAction>; setStreak: (streak: number) => void; updateOnlineStatus: (isOnline: boolean) => void; setLastSync: (timestamp: string | null) => void; }

interface.name: LoadingSpinnerProps
interface.signature: interface LoadingSpinnerProps { size?: 'small' | 'medium' | 'large'; className?: string; label?: string; }

interface.name: ErrorBoundaryProps
interface.signature: interface ErrorBoundaryProps { children: React.ReactNode; fallback?: React.ComponentType<{ error: Error; resetError: () => void }>; onError?: (error: Error, errorInfo: React.ErrorInfo) => void; }

tests.standards: Vitest 3.2.4 with React Testing Library 16.3.0. 100% coverage thresholds enforced (statements, branches, functions, lines). AAA pattern mandatory (Arrange, Act, Assert). Use custom render from tests/test-utils.tsx which wraps components with all context providers. Use userEvent for user interactions. Use getByRole, getByLabelText, getByText for accessibility-first queries.

ideas.idea: BottomNav: Test renders 4 tabs, active highlighting, keyboard navigation (Tab/Enter), ARIA attributes
StreakCounter: Test reads streak from context, singular/plural "Day(s)", tap animation triggers
LoadingSpinner: Test 3 size variants render correct dimensions, ARIA role="status" present
ErrorBoundary: Test catches thrown error, shows fallback, retry resets boundary, logs error
All components: Verify 100% coverage via npm run test with coverage report
